params.prompt: Use the reference as a premium natural-history style guide, but make the biology clearer: a single paradise flying snake gliding high over rainforest, closer to camera, body visibly flattened into a wide ribbon-like airfoil with underside/belly edge visible, S-shaped wave from head to tail, fully airborne with open sky-green negative space around it, no wings, no legs, no branch contact, no extra snakes, no text, no logo, no watermark, no UI.

Create a matching cinematic wildlife source plate: one paradise flying snake just after launching from a tall tree branch. The branch is behind on the left edge, but the snake is completely separated from it and already airborne, body flattened wider than normal into a ribbon, S-curve posture, open rainforest air ahead, no wings, no legs, no support, no extra snakes, accurate snake anatomy, no text, no logo, no watermark, no UI.

Use the reference style but make a clearer tree-to-tree steering frame: one flying snake gliding through a rainforest gap toward a destination tree branch on the right, snake large enough for phone viewing, fully airborne and not touching anything, flattened ribbon-like body in a clean S wave, tree trunks at edges only, open negative space around snake, realistic natural history photograph, no wings, no legs, no extra snakes, no text, no logo, no watermark, no UI.
